JUDGE PRO-TEM ARNOLD EVJE;PDOWLING,REPORTER;DOKAZAKI,CLERK. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT; BOTH IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED PER STIPULATED JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGMENT TO BE SUBMITTED TO COURT FOR SIGNATURE.
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES AS TO DEFENDANT DREW, DWAINE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DREW, DWAINE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 350 TURK STREET #T1108, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL DEC-04-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT IF DFT VACATES BY 11:59PM ON 12-3-96. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS & FEES. NO FURTHER STAYS. SEC DEPOSIT RETAINED BY PLTF. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. PLTF WIL L MOVE TO VACATE JUDGMNT IF DEFT VACATES TIMELY.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO AS TO DEFENDANT DREW, DWAINE DOES 1 TO 4 SUMMONS ISSUED
